title: Kannadikkala Lyrics Maaveeran Kittu
stanzas:
Kannadikkala Song Lyrics From Maaveeran Kittu
Singer:Pooja Vaidyanath, Jithin Raj,
Lyrics:Yugabharathi,

Kannadikkala kaipudikkala
pachcha poiya
solla solla vaangum
paaraatta vanna
poo mootta (2)

vandhadhenna soppanangal
sollidaamale
unnai andri selvam illai
indha vazhvilae (2)

allal padum vazhgum
azhagaagum inimele ..
kotti koduthaalum
kidaikaadhe unai pole.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kannadikkala?

The song Kannadikkala is a romantic melody that explores themes of love and longing.

Who are the singers of Kannadikkala?

The song is sung by Jithin Raj and Pooja Vaidyanath.

Who composed the music for Maaveeran Kittu?

The music for Maaveeran Kittu was composed by D Imman.

What is the release year of Maaveeran Kittu?

The movie Maaveeran Kittu was released in 2016.

What role does the song play in the movie Maaveeran Kittu?

The song enhances the romantic narrative of the film, highlighting the emotional connection between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kannadikkala is a romantic duet from the movie Maaveeran Kittu, beautifully sung by Jithin Raj and Pooja Vaidyanath. The song, composed by D Imman and penned by Yugabharathi, captures the essence of love and longing. It plays a significant role in the film, enhancing the emotional connection between the lead characters. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke feelings of romance and nostalgia, making it a perfect choice for intimate moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannadikkala from the film Maaveeran Kittu, where D Imman's soulful composition meets the harmonious voices of Jithin Raj and Pooja Vaidyanath. This romantic duet, penned by Yugabharathi, captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics that make this song a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Come closer, hold hands, let love dance and sway gently.
You listen to my song every day.
Come closer, hold hands, tell sweet lies and receive praise like colorful flowers.
Every day, my heart spins around you like dust.
There is some comfort in it, and it feels easy for me.
A desire to lift the sickle with longing.
Come closer, hold hands, let love dance and sway gently.
Listen to the sound of drums and see the ancient treasures.
What dreams have come, without telling, there is no wealth in this life without you.
Life will be beautiful despite struggles, even if given freely, nothing is like you.
Fell into the salt lake and found a pearl, my life.
Come closer, hold hands, let love dance and sway gently.
You listen to my song every day.
Every day, my heart spins around you like dust.
There is some comfort in it, and it feels easy for me.
A desire to lift the sickle with longing.
